issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as empty result sets or null values.

scenarios.name: Rewrite slow YEAR()-filtered Postgres query and add index
scenarios.rationale: Baseline rewrites the predicate and drops SELECT * but orders the composite index range-before-equality, against the skill's guideline; treatment applies equality-then-range and cites the relevant anti-patterns explicitly.

scenarios.name: Fix Django N+1 with 200+ queries on order-customer listing
scenarios.rationale: Both diagnose N+1 and apply select_related correctly, but treatment mirrors the skill's exact code pattern and adds the raw-SQL JOIN equivalence as a verification step.
